acceptedApiChanges.acceptation: Should only be used to track inputs

ConventionReportTask.getOutputFile became abstract during the lazy-property migration. japicmp raises this as a class-level ABSTRACT_METHOD_ADDED_IN_SUPERCLASS on every subclass, which BinaryBreakingChangesRule reports on the JApiClass. The Upgraded-property suppression in UpgradedProperties.shouldAcceptForUpgradedProperty only handles JApiMethod, so this kind of class-level violation must be accepted explicitly.
changes: Abstract method has been added to a superclass
